title: CTET September 2026 Online Form
RSSB Computer Instructor Recruitment 2026
qualification:
Senior Computer Instructor: M.E./M.Tech / M.Sc. / MCA / B Level / C Level in relevant computer/IT fields. Basic Computer Instructor: Graduate with A Level / PGDCA / B.E./B.Tech / B.Sc. / BCA in relevant fields. Hindi Devanagari script and Rajasthan culture knowledge required.

Post Name: Basic Computer Instructor
Qualification: Candidates must be a graduate with ‘A’ Level or PGDCA (minimum 1 year), or hold a B.E./B.Tech degree in Computer Science, IT, ECE, EE, EEE, EIC, or TIE, or a B.Sc. in Computer Science/IT, or a BCA from a recognized university. Any equivalent or higher qualification recognized by the Government is also acceptable. Candidates should also have working knowledge of Hindi written in Devanagari script and knowledge of Rajasthani culture.

Post Name: Senior Computer Instructor
Qualification: Candidates must have an M.E./M.Tech degree in Computer  Science, IT, ECE, EE, EEE, ETE, or EIE; or an M.Sc. in Computer Science/IT; or MCA/’B’ Level/’C’ Level qualification, or any equivalent/higher qualification recognized by the Government. Candidates should also have working knowledge of Hindi written in Devanagari script and knowledge of Rajasthani culture.

title: JHTET Jharkhand Online Form 2026
qualification:
Primary Level Teachers (Class 1 to 5): Candidates must have passed 10+2 / Intermediate with at least 50% marks or 45% as per NCTE rules along with passed or appearing in 2-year Diploma in Elementary Education (BTC / D.El.Ed), OR 4-year B.El.Ed, OR 2-year Diploma in Special Education. Candidates with Bachelor's Degree and passed or appearing in 2-year Diploma in Elementary Education are also eligible.

Upper Primary Teacher (Class 6 to 8): Candidates must have Bachelor's Degree with passed or appearing in 2-year Diploma in Elementary Education (BTC / D.El.Ed), OR Bachelor's Degree with at least 50% marks or 45% as per NCTE rules and B.Ed / L.T. / Shiksha Shastri, OR 10+2 with at least 50% marks and 4-year B.El.Ed / B.A.Ed / B.Sc.Ed, OR Bachelor's Degree with at least 50% marks and B.Ed Special Education, OR Master's Degree with 55% marks and 3-year integrated B.Ed-M.Ed course.
